codeReview.summary: The fix directly addresses the prior blocker: it adds explicit artifact pagination regression coverage for both direct artifact traversal and rebuild artifact pagination paths, including >page-size datasets, exact page boundaries, and non-divisible page sizes with deterministic no-skip/no-duplicate assertions.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Procedure-compliance evidence remains inconsistent: the worker marked `followedProcedure=true`, but required startup-read evidence and reads for all mandated files (especially `.factory/library/user-testing.md`) are not fully demonstrated.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Mission AGENTS hard gate requires evidence reads for mission.md, AGENTS.md, features.json, services.yaml, architecture.md, and user-testing.md. Fix transcript skeleton (workerSessionId d15e51e4-10e7-46a4-807d-755ec6747b74) shows reads for mission.md/AGENTS.md/validation-contract.md/features.json/services.yaml/architecture.md but no user-testing.md read. Fix handoff verification lists only one startup evidence command (`head` mission.md + AGENTS.md), yet `skillFeedback.followedProcedure` is true.

summary: Pass: the fix resolves the original blocking gap by adding explicit multi-page artifact pagination boundary regression tests with deterministic no-skip/no-duplicate coverage across >page-size, exact-boundary, and non-divisible cases. No remaining blocking code issues were found.
